brand.title: Welcome to Asagi
brand.subtitle: Bring your ChatGPT subscription into a calm Japanese-first interface.
brand.body: Asagi is a Japanese-first IDE that lets non-experts work with Codex. Switch between projects like Slack, paste images, and chat in your own language.

oauth.title: Sign in with ChatGPT
oauth.subtitle: Use your subscription directly. No API key required.
oauth.body: Pressing the button opens ChatGPT's auth flow in your browser. Asagi automatically detects when you finish.
oauth.note: Stub before Phase 0 POC clearance. The real implementation spawns `codex login` via the Tauri Shell plugin.

permissions.title: Permissions & sample
permissions.subtitle: What Asagi can access on your machine.

items.codexProcess: Spawn and talk to the Codex CLI process
items.keyring: Use the OS keyring for secure settings
items.noTelemetry: No telemetry. Chat logs never leave your device.

permissions.sampleBody: Type 'hello' to receive a stub response. Real integration arrives with AS-110.
